summary: Draft remediation for 3 governance findings plus the stale-reference observation, in namespace faulty.

patch_hunks.description: Remove the direct identifier research_export.patient_id from the export select list.
patch_hunks.before:
select
    registry_case_id,
    patient_id,   -- direct identifier retained
    ed_arrival_datetime,
    ...

patch_hunks.description: Carry the paired gcs_total_missingness state column through instead of dropping it.
patch_hunks.before:
case when gcs_total_missingness in (...) then null else gcs_total end as gcs_total,
-- gcs_total_missingness not selected

patch_hunks.description: Derive ml_feature_table.raw_mode_of_arrival_feature from the validated registry rather than the raw source.
patch_hunks.before:
..., raw_mode_of_arrival_feature
-- left join stg_ed_documentation (unvalidated) as the feature source
patch_hunks.after: -- feature dropped, or re-derived via trauma_registry

patch_hunks.description: Use the post-rename ed_arrival_datetime name instead of the stale arrival_time.

impact_report_markdown:
# Migration impact report (draft)

The migration renamed the encounter timestamp arrival_time -> ed_arrival_datetime in trauma_registry. The faulty state carries the governance findings below.

## Affected downstream datasets/columns
- dashboard_report.arrival_time — carries the renamed encounter timestamp
- dq_metrics.ed_arrival_datetime — carries the renamed encounter timestamp
- ml_feature_table.ed_arrival_datetime — carries the renamed encounter timestamp
- research_export.ed_arrival_datetime — carries the renamed encounter timestamp
- dashboard_report.arrival_time — stale reference: dashboard_report.arrival_time persists after trauma_registry renamed it to ed_arrival_datetime

## Findings

- **PHI_EXPORT_PATH** (export_governance): Direct identifier research_export.patient_id is retained in a research export (must be excluded).
- **MISSINGNESS_COLLAPSE** (completeness): Explicit-missingness contract on gcs_total collapsed: trauma_registry keeps gcs_total but dropped the paired gcs_total_missingness carried by stg_ed_documentation.
- **UNVALIDATED_ML_SOURCE** (readiness): ML feature ml_feature_table.raw_mode_of_arrival_feature is derived directly from the unvalidated source stg_ed_documentation, bypassing the validated registry.

## Proposed remediation

- research_export [PHI_EXPORT_PATH]: Remove the direct identifier research_export.patient_id from the export select list.
- trauma_registry [MISSINGNESS_COLLAPSE]: Carry the paired gcs_total_missingness state column through instead of dropping it.
- ml_feature_table [UNVALIDATED_ML_SOURCE]: Derive ml_feature_table.raw_mode_of_arrival_feature from the validated registry rather than the raw source.
- dashboard_report [STALE_REFERENCE]: Use the post-rename ed_arrival_datetime name instead of the stale arrival_time.
